selection.name: Archie - Approachable Mate
selection.why: Field-readable, human, and not too announcer-like.

selection.name: Daniel - Modern Assistant
selection.why: Clear, clipped, and easy to cut through static.

selection.name: Skylar - Friendly Guide
selection.why: Readable and immediate for quick sighting calls.

selection.name: Gemma - Decisive Agent
selection.why: Authority without sounding like a general-purpose assistant.

selection.name: Katie - Friendly Fixer
selection.why: Soft enough for after-action lessons without losing clarity.
